overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city street transitioning to an open waterfront promenade during golden hour sunset. The player moves from a covered urban walkway through an underpass into a palm-tree lined waterfront area with futuristic traffic and pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered neon-lit pedestrian walkway toward underpass

entered.detail: large concrete overpass structure with neon lighting underneath
bright digital billboards with cyberpunk advertisements on building facades
low red concrete wall separating pedestrian walkway from building
sleek futuristic car with neon underglow driving on adjacent road

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered urban walkway illuminated by vibrant neon billboards and digital screens. The path is flanked by a red concrete barrier on the left and a road with futuristic traffic on the right, moving toward a darker underpass ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban underpass with concrete walls and ceiling

events.description: entering darker underpass area with reduced artificial lighting
approaching bright exit with increasing natural sunlight visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through dimly lit concrete underpass toward bright exit

entered.detail: smooth concrete walls lining the sides of the underpass
exposed industrial ceiling with ventilation ducts and pipes

segments.scene_description: Moving through a narrow concrete underpass with industrial ceiling infrastructure. The lighting transitions from neon artificial to dim ambient as the camera approaches a bright exit revealing palm trees and sunset ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with palm trees at sunset

events.description: exiting underpass into open waterfront area with bright golden hour sunset
full exposure to warm sunset light creating long shadows on pavement

agents.ego_description: walking out of underpass into open waterfront area facing bright sunset

entered.detail: tall palm trees silhouetted against the bright sunset sky
bright golden hour sun low on the horizon over water
metal railing separating walkway from waterfront drop
multi-story modern buildings with reflective glass windows

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass into a wide-open waterfront promenade bathed in golden hour sunlight. Palm trees line the path leading toward the water while modern buildings stand to the right, with the bright sun creating dramatic silhouettes and long shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and futuristic traffic

events.description: waiting at crosswalk as futuristic black car drives through intersection
turning head to observe traffic and pedestrians waiting at intersection

agents.ego_description: waiting at crosswalk and observing futuristic traffic before crossing street

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving through the intersection
futuristic sports car waiting at the traffic signal

entered.detail: zebra crossing stripes painted on the asphalt road surface
futuristic traffic light hanging over the intersection

segments.scene_description: Standing at a crosswalk during golden hour, waiting for futuristic vehicles to pass. The camera turns to survey the intersection, showing palm trees lining the street and modern commercial buildings while pedestrians gather to cross.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with modern commercial buildings

events.description: turning right to walk along waterfront path away from intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along waterfront promenade passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in white tank top walking along the promenade

entered.detail: large multi-story office complex with glass windows and ground floor shops
large digital billboard displaying advertisements near the waterfront
low concrete wall with metal rail separating walkway from lower level

segments.scene_description: Walking along the waterfront promenade with the setting sun casting warm light on the pavement. Passing by a modern office building with ground-level shops on the right and a concrete railing overlooking the water on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway entrance with concrete support columns

events.description: approaching covered building entrance with neon signage and concrete columns

agents.ego_description: walking toward covered building entrance under concrete overpass structure

entered.detail: large cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the overpass structure
covered entranceway leading into the building interior
bright purple and red neon signs for ground floor shops

segments.scene_description: Approaching a covered building entrance with massive concrete support columns. The scene transitions from open waterfront back to a semi-covered urban space with neon shop signs illuminating the walkway as the sun disappears behind the structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit urban corridor through a dim underpass and into a sun-drenched waterfront promenade. It begins along a covered walkway flanked by vibrant digital billboards and futuristic traffic, moving steadily toward the shadows of a narrow concrete underpass. As the camera emerges from the industrial tunnel, the dim ambient light shifts abruptly into the brilliant gold of a sunset, opening up into a wide promenade lined with palm trees and silhouetted modern buildings. The scene then transitions through a busy intersection with waiting pedestrians before gliding along the water's edge, where warm light reflects off the pavement and office facades. Finally, the camera approaches a massive concrete structure, moving from the open coastal air back into a semi-covered urban space as neon shop signs reappear and the sun disappears behind the architecture.
